nasb.text: who say, ‘The time is not near to build houses. This city is the pot and we are the flesh.’

esv.text: who say, ‘The time is not near to build houses. This city is the cauldron, and we are the meat.’

cnv.text: 他們說：‘建造房屋的時候還沒有到；這城是鍋，我們是肉。’

ccb.text: 他们说，‘建造房屋的时候不是到了吗？我们的城像铁锅一样坚固，我们像在锅里的肉一样得到保护。’
